titleStmt.title: SII 38.92: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 92. (A.R. No. 92 of 1912.) GŌRAṆṬLA, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT. On a slab lying in the Madhavarāyasvāmin temple.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year: Śaka 1276, Jaya, Māgha, śu. di. akshyat, Saturday: 1354 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription traces the geneology of the Sāḷuvas, both mythical and historical. It refers to the Yadu descent and connects the family with the Chāḷukyas. Mention is made of Bijjaḷa, Hemmāḍirāya and Śrīkanṭha-chōḷa. Maṅgi I, Saṅkidēva, Maṅgi II and the donor Narasiṅgarāja are named in succession. A certain king Narasiṅga of the Sāḷuva family built the temple of Vishṇu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Avighnamastu pāṁtuvaḥ paṁkaja kāṁta nābhipaṁka
jareṇavaḥ yēbhyaḥ prasūtamakhilaṁ jāgatē sa carācaraṁ
sa jayati yaduvaṁśāyasya sōmagragaṇyasamajanika
likālē tatra cāḷikyavaṁśaḥ prabhavasadanamahu¨ryyasyaka
ṇamādyaḥ kaṭakamabhavada¨rsmibijjaḷakṣōṇipālaḥ ta¨rsmi
praśāsa(śi) mahiṁjinadha¨rma nityārājāsthiti bhagavati jagati babhū
va dēhēmāḍirāya Iti sapratiśiṣṭhatismayasyā¨rtajastriṇaya
naṁ tripurāṁtakākhyaṁ bijjaḷarāyatanūjastripurāṁtakaca
raṇanaḷinaṣaṭṭaraṇaḥ Ādivarāhavadavanīṁbi¨rbhraddharaṇi
hatāṁbheje tasmādabhūttāmarasāyatākṣa śrīkaṁṭhacō
śvaśivaṁśakētuḥ Adyājayatī¨rdhamudāharaṁtidāśāvadūḥ
ppaṇatāṁdadānāṁ tasmātpratāpabalapauruṣavikrama śrī sauṁda
¨ryya śāleva¨rpuṣaspṛhaṇīyakīttiḥ śrīma¨rṁdevaśiti bhūvati
rāvirāsidvāhābalaprasamitāribalāvanē mīsara
gaṁḍḍastasmādāsicca saṁkidēvanrupaḥ maṁgi mahiśastastā
bhūdvaṁśamettikaprakaraḥ . saṁkidēvāṁhvayastasya tanayō bhūnya
hābalaḥ Iricakrāśmayōvīraṁ śrīvidhaṁ pāṇipadmayōḥ cāḷa(ḷu)
kyavaṁśatiḷakāda rapratimalēcamastasmāt . samajanikaṭhāri sāḷu
va birudobele pōdhamaṁgidēvākhyaḥ . jātaḥ payōdaśāvapū¨rṇacaṁdraḥ
puṁsaḥ parasmādi vapuṣpabāṇaḥ saṁtāna vṛṣādivadāna śaktipākyā
giṣatiśāṁ narasiṁgarājaḥ sapratyaśiṣṭhadvaradēśvarasyamutaṁmudākaṁ
dāmajanā¨rdanasya śrīyānadēḥ kētavavallabhasyadinandi bhūtyanarasiṁgarājaḥ
. svasti śrī saśailanētraśaśaśrībhṛtā śākābdē
pra śrījayavatsarē jaya
ti¨rdātanmāpughamāsapakepakṣamaṁdadinē¨ryyamakṣasahitabhaktyānṛsiṁha
karoddavasvahajanā¨rdanasyavidivasaṁmyakpratiṣṭhāṁsahaṁ śāsanaṁ bhavatu
puṇyavāsanaya¨rvvabhūpatimanovikāsanaṁ Aṁhasāmanukaḷaṁ nirāsanaṁ
saṁvidāṁncasatataṁ prabhāsanaṁ śrīśrīśrī yaṁnāmasmaraṇaṁ prati
ṣitibhujāṁ samōhanaṁ yati bhujālīlāmaṁdirami jarāma dhamō
¨ryyatka¨rmmadhammōtāraṁyasmatraṁ pratibiṁbamādhavasudhaya¨rtittarēkāśini sa
śrīmāṁnnarasiṁgabhūpatirayaṁ bhūyādbhupūṇaṁ sāmāṇyāyaṁ
dha¨rmmasētunrupāṇāṁ kātikātipālaṁyyōbhavadbhiḥ sa¨rvvānyētānbhāvinaḥ pārthi
Ācaṁdrānyāyāmayōyācati rāmacaṁdraḥ maṁggaḷamahāmahā
māyeliUṁḍḍanaṭlānu devaru Aṁggaraṁggebhōga
tikṣatrālu tāṁbrivāsōlanuṁ
Digital edition of SII 38.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
